summary: Validate R0 recovery baseline exit gate
acceptance_criteria: Verify origin/main, RR0 branch, status files, task graph, thread registry, goal-mode state, and model-routing state are internally consistent.
Verify all production entrypoints, fixture/test paths, and no-op command surfaces from the R0 audit are recorded.
Verify no forbidden product code, dependency, content-source, CI, accepted ADR, or historical Gate file changed during R0.
Confirm Autonomous Goal Mode remains enabled and no active Human Gate exists after roadmap acceptance.
Recommend R0_GATE = PASS, REQUEST_CHANGES, or BLOCK with evidence.
required_tests: node -e parse all changed JSON files
git diff --name-only check proving no forbidden paths changed
notes: R0 exit validation must not start R1 work.
If any required check cannot run, status must be PARTIAL or BLOCKED rather than DONE.
